languages.original_text: "You, malformed mon-keigh, surprise me more than all the others. I do not believe my eyes, but... Do you really not distinguish between your brothers?"

languages.text: "Ты, искаженный мон-кай, удивляешь меня больше прочих. Я не верю своим глазам, но... Ты и вправду не отличаешь одних своих братьев от других?"
languages.translation_comment: The characters came to medbay after the Rogue Trader allowed the use of augmentations on the bodies of commoners.

languages.text: "You, malformed mon-keigh, surprise me more than all the others. I do not believe my eyes, but... Do you really not distinguish between your brothers?"
languages.original_text: "Ты, искаженный мон-кай, удивляешь меня больше прочих. Я не верю своим глазам, но... Ты и вправду не отличаешь одних своих братьев от других?"

traits.locale_text: "You, malformed mon-keigh, surprise me more than all the others. I do not believe my eyes, but... Do you really not distinguish between your brothers?"
"You, malformed mon-keigh, surprise me more than all the others. I do not believe my eyes, but... Do you really not distinguish between your brothers?"
"You, malformed mon-keigh, surprise me more than all the others. I do not believe my eyes, but... Do you really not distinguish between your brothers?"

languages.text: 「お前、変形したモンケィ、他の奴らより驚いた。信じられないが…兄弟と区別できないのか？」
languages.original_text: "You, malformed mon-keigh, surprise me more than all the others. I do not believe my eyes, but... Do you really not distinguish between your brothers?"

traits.locale_text: 「お前、変形したモンケィ、他の奴らより驚いた。信じられないが…お前、兄弟と区別できないのか？」

languages.text: « Vous, mon-keigh malformé, me surprenez plus que tous les autres. Je n'en crois pas mes yeux, mais... ne faites-vous vraiment aucune distinction entre vos frères ? »
languages.original_text: "You, malformed mon-keigh, surprise me more than all the others. I do not believe my eyes, but... Do you really not distinguish between your brothers?"

traits.locale_text: « Vous, mon-keigh malformé, me surprenez plus que tous les autres. Je n'en crois pas mes yeux, mais... ne faites-vous vraiment aucune distinction entre vos frères ? »

languages.text: "Ihr, missgebildeter Chem-Pan-Sey, überrascht mich mehr als all die anderen. Ich traue meinen Augen nicht, aber ... Unterscheidet Ihr wirklich nicht zwischen Euren Brüdern?"
languages.original_text: "You, malformed mon-keigh, surprise me more than all the others. I do not believe my eyes, but... Do you really not distinguish between your brothers?"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr, missgebildeter Chem-Pan-Sey, überrascht mich mehr als all die anderen. Ich traue meinen Augen nicht, aber ... Unterscheidet Ihr wirklich nicht zwischen Euren Brüdern?"

languages.text: "Kusurlu mon-keigh, sen beni diğerlerinden daha çok şaşırtıyorsun. Gözlerime inanamıyorum ama... Gerçekten kardeşlerinle arandaki farkı ayırt edemiyor musun?"
languages.original_text: "You, malformed mon-keigh, surprise me more than all the others. I do not believe my eyes, but... Do you really not distinguish between your brothers?"

traits.locale_text: "Kusurlu mon-keigh, sen beni diğerlerinden daha çok şaşırtıyorsun. Gözlerime inanamıyorum ama... Gerçekten kardeşlerinle arandaki farkı ayırt edemiyor musun?"

languages.text: «Tú, mon-keigh deforme, me sorprendes más que ningún otro. Yo no creo lo que ven mis ojos, pero... ¿de verdad eres incapaz de distinguir a tus propios hermanos?».
languages.original_text: "You, malformed mon-keigh, surprise me more than all the others. I do not believe my eyes, but... Do you really not distinguish between your brothers?"

traits.locale_text: «Tú, mon-keigh deforme, me sorprendes más que ningún otro. Yo no creo lo que ven mis ojos, pero... ¿de verdad eres incapaz de distinguir a tus propios hermanos?».

languages.text: “你这畸形的猴子，倒比你的同类都更让我开眼。我简直无法相信……难道你真的无法分辨自己的同胞吗？”
languages.original_text: "You, malformed mon-keigh, surprise me more than all the others. I do not believe my eyes, but... Do you really not distinguish between your brothers?"

traits.locale_text: “你这畸形的猴子，倒比你的同类都更让我开眼。我简直无法相信……难道你真的无法分辨自己的同胞吗？”
